Package com.rays.form

Class MarksheetForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm
      • com.rays.form.MarksheetForm
  • public class MarksheetForm
extends BaseForm
    MarksheetForm is a form class used for capturing marksheet-related data. This class extends BaseForm and contains fields for student marks with validation constraints.

    This form is used to collect and validate marksheet information such as roll number, student ID, student name, and marks in physics, chemistry, and mathematics before converting it to a MarksheetDTO object for database operations.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      • getDto

        public BaseDTO getDto()
        Converts the form data to a MarksheetDTO object. This method initializes a DTO using the parent class method and populates it with form field values.
        Overrides:
        getDto in class BaseForm
        Returns:
        the populated MarksheetDTO object
